name: cogni-server
description: Cogni - Robo Tutor de Reforco Escolar (Backend)

scripts.check: node --eval "const{execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');function walk(d){return fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true}).flatMap(e=>{const p=path.join(d,e.name);if(e.name==='node_modules')return[];return e.isDirectory()?walk(p):p.endsWith('.js')?[p]:[]})}for(const f of walk('.'))execSync('node --check '+JSON.stringify(f));console.log('Sintaxe OK')"
